title: Performs Feats of Strength
summary: A muscled prodigy, you can haul incredible weight, hurl your body through the air, and punch through doors.
tiers: Tier 6: Greater Enhanced Might or Jump Attack
gm_intrusions: It’s easy to break delicate things or hurt someone accidentally.
